name: RMW - M110 SASS
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The army needed a DMR. They loved the M16. Guess what happened. Its a 7.62 Nato Designated Marksman Rifle based on the AR15 Platform. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
